title: Duplicate Items in Social Media Calendar Template
excerpt: Hi everyone! Im a monday.com newbie so bear with me! When setting up our social media workflow and calendar items are getting duplicated. They appear on the day I created the item and the day I want it scheduled for. Any…

posts.author: JKnappe (Jessie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! Im a monday.com newbie so bear with me! When setting up our social media workflow and calendar items are getting duplicated. They appear on the day I created the item and the day I want it scheduled for. Any ideas why that is happening?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JKnappe could be you have 2 date columns both showing in the calendar. if you open up the calendar settings you should see an option of which dates to show here is an example.

Screen Shot 2022-04-07 at 11.23.02 AM1857×613 74.9 KB

posts.author: JKnappe (Jessie)
posts.cookedHtml: Well that was a simple fix haha! Thank you!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
